Germick Family Portal
Home Make a Submission?

Chicken Divan

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield: Lots

Ingredients

1 pkg. frozen broccoli spears 2 chicken breast, boned & cooked 1 can cream of chicken soup 1/2 cup mayo OR sour cream 1/2 tsp. lemon juice 1/2 tsp. curry powder 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese 1/4 cup soft bread crumbs 2 Tbl. melted butter 1/2 tsp. lemon juice 1/2 tsp. curry powder 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese 1/4 cup soft bread crumbs 2 Tbl. melted butter

Modifications: -> To turn this dish into a “Memorial Day Weekend” - sized casserole, use:

3.5 lb fresh broccoli crowns, lightly steamed 6 lb chicken breasts, cooked & shredded in advance 4 cans cream of whatever soup 16 oz sour cream 2/8 oz cans or 1 lb fresh mushrooms And I fake the other ingredients proportionately

Directions

  1. Cook broccoli in boiling, salted water.
  2. Drain and arrange in shallow 1 1/2 qt. baking dish.
  3. Simmer chicken in small amount of water for 35 minutes till done.
  4. Drain, cut up & arrange over broccoli.
  5. Mix next 4 ingredients and pour over top.
  6. Sprinkle with cheese & bread crumbs mixed with butter.
  7. Bake for 25 minutes @ 350. Serve over rice.

Modification:

Above is the original recipe. I have changed it a bit to make it my own. I ditched the curry powder and bread crumbs, usually add mushrooms, and top with french fried onion rings and lots of grated cheddar.

Plan this would need to bake at 350 for at least an hour.
